title.en: EHT PHY Quality Floor: Receiver Sensitivity, CCA, Transmit/Receive Procedures, and the PLME
title.zh: EHT PHY 质量底线：接收灵敏度、CCA、收发流程与 PLME

blocks.en: A Wi-Fi 7 radio is only useful if it can actually hear faint signals, ignore loud neighbours, and build and parse a frame the same way every other compliant device does. Clause 36 of 802.11be turns that into hard numbers. Two failure modes drive the whole subclause: a transmitter that is too dirty corrupts the air for everyone, and a receiver that is too deaf cannot decode what it is sent. The receiver specification pins down four conformance limits — minimum input sensitivity, adjacent and nonadjacent channel rejection, and maximum input level — plus the CCA energy-detect thresholds that decide when the medium is 'busy'.
blocks.zh: 一台 Wi-Fi 7 设备只有在真正能听到微弱信号、能忽略吵闹的邻居、并且和其他合规设备以完全相同的方式构造与解析帧时，才是有用的。802.11be 的第 36 章把这些要求量化成了硬性数字。整个子条款由两种失效模式驱动：发射机太“脏”会污染所有人的空口，而接收机太“聋”则无法解出收到的信号。接收机规范因此钉死了四项一致性指标——最小输入灵敏度、相邻信道抑制、非相邻信道抑制、最大输入电平——再加上决定信道何时“忙”的 CCA 能量检测门限。

blocks.en: Receiver minimum input sensitivity (36.3.21.2) is the deafness floor: for each modulation and coding rate the standard lists the weakest signal at which the packet error rate (PER) must still stay below 10%. The numbers scale two ways. Denser constellations need more signal — BPSK 1/2 must work down to about -82 dBm in a 20 MHz channel, while 4096-QAM 5/6 needs roughly -46 dBm. And wider channels spread the same energy over more spectrum, so each doubling of bandwidth relaxes the floor by 3 dB: that -82 dBm at 20 MHz becomes -79, -76, -73, and -70 dBm at 40, 80, 160, and 320 MHz.
blocks.zh: 接收机最小输入灵敏度（36.3.21.2）就是“聋”的底线：标准为每一种调制方式和编码率列出了一个最弱信号电平，在该电平下分组错误率（PER）仍必须低于 10%。这些数值在两个方向上变化。星座图越密就需要越强的信号——在 20 MHz 信道下，BPSK 1/2 必须能工作到约 -82 dBm，而 4096-QAM 5/6 则需要约 -46 dBm。同时，更宽的信道把相同的能量摊到更多频谱上，因此带宽每翻一倍，门限就放宽 3 dB：20 MHz 下的 -82 dBm 在 40、80、160、320 MHz 下分别变为 -79、-76、-73、-70 dBm。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 460 230' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><line x1='55' y1='20' x2='55' y2='190'/><line x1='55' y1='190' x2='430' y2='190'/><text x='12' y='30' font-size='11' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>dBm</text><text x='380' y='210' font-size='11' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>denser MCS →</text><text x='20' y='60' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-50</text><text x='20' y='120' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-66</text><text x='20' y='185' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-82</text><polyline points='80,178 150,150 220,120 290,90 360,55' stroke-dasharray='0'/><circle cx='80' cy='178' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='150' cy='150' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='220' cy='120' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='290' cy='90' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='360' cy='55' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><text x='66' y='176' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>BPSK</text><text x='325' y='50' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>4096-QAM</text><line x1='55' y1='130' x2='430' y2='130' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><text x='300' y='145' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>CCA-ED busy threshold idea</text></svg>

caption.en: Sensitivity floor for a 20 MHz EHT PPDU: denser modulations demand a stronger received signal to hold PER below 10%. Values are illustrative, drawn from Table 36-67.
caption.zh: 20 MHz EHT PPDU 的灵敏度底线：调制越密，就需要越强的接收信号才能把 PER 压在 10% 以下。图中数值为示意，取自表 36-67。

blocks.en: Rejection and overload bound the other side. Adjacent channel rejection (36.3.21.3) and nonadjacent channel rejection (36.3.21.4) measure how much louder an interferer in a neighbouring channel can be while the wanted signal — set 3 dB above its sensitivity — still decodes at under 10% PER; nonadjacent interferers (at least 2x the channel width away) must be rejected far more strongly. Maximum input level (36.3.21.5) is the overload ceiling: the receiver must still hit 10% PER with a desired signal as strong as -30 dBm in 5/6 GHz (-20 dBm in 2.4 GHz) without saturating.
blocks.zh: 抑制与过载则限定了另一侧。相邻信道抑制（36.3.21.3）与非相邻信道抑制（36.3.21.4）衡量的是：在邻近信道里的干扰信号可以比有用信号（置于其灵敏度之上 3 dB）强多少，而有用信号仍能以低于 10% 的 PER 被解出；对于至少相隔 2 倍信道带宽的非相邻干扰，则必须以强得多的程度加以抑制。最大输入电平（36.3.21.5）是过载上限：当有用信号强达 5/6 GHz 频段的 -30 dBm（2.4 GHz 频段为 -20 dBm）时，接收机仍必须达到 10% 的 PER 而不发生饱和。

blocks.en: CCA sensitivity (36.3.21.6) is how the radio decides the channel is occupied. The general rule (36.3.21.6.1) compares thresholds against the signal at each receive antenna. CCA-ED (36.3.21.6.2) is energy detection for operating classes that require it. The primary 20 MHz rule (36.3.21.6.3) is the one most often quoted: a STA must detect the start of a non-HT/VHT/HE/EHT PPDU on the primary channel at or above -82 dBm with >90% probability and raise PHY-CCA.indication(BUSY) within aCCATime — while any signal above -62 dBm (or a MediumSyncDelay value) also forces busy. The per-20 MHz rule (36.3.21.6.4) fills a per20bitmap: a subchannel is busy at -62 dBm of any signal, or at max(-72 dBm, OBSS_PDlevel) for a recognised PPDU.
blocks.zh: CCA 灵敏度（36.3.21.6）决定了设备如何判断信道已被占用。通用规则（36.3.21.6.1）将门限与每个接收天线上的信号进行比较。CCA-ED（36.3.21.6.2）是为需要它的工作类别提供的能量检测。主 20 MHz 规则（36.3.21.6.3）是最常被引用的一条：站点必须以大于 90% 的概率检测到主信道上电平不低于 -82 dBm 的 non-HT/VHT/HE/EHT PPDU 起始，并在 aCCATime 内发出 PHY-CCA.indication(BUSY)；同时，任何高于 -62 dBm（或 MediumSyncDelay 对应值）的信号也都会强制置忙。每 20 MHz 规则（36.3.21.6.4）则填充一个 per20bitmap：当任意信号达到 -62 dBm，或被识别的 PPDU 达到 max(-72 dBm, OBSS_PDlevel) 时，该子信道即为忙。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
    participant MAC
    participant PHY
    Note over MAC,PHY: EHT transmit procedure (36.3.22)
    MAC->>PHY: PHY-TXSTART.request (TXVECTOR)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-TXSTART.confirm
    MAC->>PHY: PHY-DATA.request (DATA) ...
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-DATA.confirm ...
    Note over PHY: build L-preamble, U-SIG, EHT-SIG/STF/LTF, Data, padding
    MAC->>PHY: PHY-TXEND.request
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-TXEND.confirm
    Note over MAC,PHY: EHT receive procedure (36.3.23)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-CCA.indication (BUSY, primary)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-RXEARLYSIG.indication
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-RXSTART.indication (RXVECTOR)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-DATA.indication (DATA) ...
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-RXEND.indication (NoError, RXVECTOR)
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
    participant MAC
    participant PHY
    Note over MAC,PHY: EHT 发送流程 (36.3.22)
    MAC->>PHY: PHY-TXSTART.request (TXVECTOR)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-TXSTART.confirm
    MAC->>PHY: PHY-DATA.request (DATA) ...
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-DATA.confirm ...
    Note over PHY: 构造 L 前导、U-SIG、EHT-SIG/STF/LTF、数据、填充
    MAC->>PHY: PHY-TXEND.request
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-TXEND.confirm
    Note over MAC,PHY: EHT 接收流程 (36.3.23)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-CCA.indication (BUSY, 主信道)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-RXEARLYSIG.indication
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-RXSTART.indication (RXVECTOR)
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-DATA.indication (DATA) ...
    PHY->>MAC: PHY-RXEND.indication (NoError, RXVECTOR)

blocks.en: The transmit and receive procedures (36.3.22 / 36.3.23) are the choreography between the MAC and PHY across the PHY-SAP. To send, the MAC issues PHY-TXSTART.request carrying the TXVECTOR (format EHT_MU or EHT_TB, plus MCS, bandwidth, coding, power); the PHY confirms, streams data in via PHY-DATA exchanges, appends PHY padding and tail bits, and the MAC ends it with PHY-TXEND. To receive, the PHY first raises PHY-CCA.indication(BUSY), then — after validating L-SIG/RL-SIG and the U-SIG CRC — issues PHY-RXEARLYSIG and PHY-RXSTART, hands decoded octets up as PHY-DATA.indication, and finishes with PHY-RXEND. Above both sits the PLME (36.4): the PLME_SAP primitives (36.4.1) and PHY MIB (36.4.2) let management read and set the radio's capabilities, and the TXTIME / PSDU_LENGTH calculation (36.4.3) lets the MAC predict exactly how long a PPDU will occupy the air before it is sent.
blocks.zh: 发送与接收流程（36.3.22 / 36.3.23）是 MAC 与 PHY 跨 PHY-SAP 之间的“编舞”。发送时，MAC 发出携带 TXVECTOR（格式 EHT_MU 或 EHT_TB，外加 MCS、带宽、编码、功率）的 PHY-TXSTART.request；PHY 予以确认，通过 PHY-DATA 交互把数据逐步送入，追加 PHY 填充比特与尾比特，最后由 MAC 用 PHY-TXEND 结束。接收时，PHY 先发出 PHY-CCA.indication(BUSY)，在校验 L-SIG/RL-SIG 及 U-SIG 的 CRC 后发出 PHY-RXEARLYSIG 与 PHY-RXSTART，把解码后的字节通过 PHY-DATA.indication 上交，并以 PHY-RXEND 收尾。在两者之上是 PLME（36.4）：PLME_SAP 原语（36.4.1）和 PHY MIB（36.4.2）让管理实体读取并设置射频能力，而 TXTIME / PSDU_LENGTH 计算（36.4.3）则让 MAC 在发送之前就能精确预测一个 PPDU 将占用空口多久。

blocks.en: Why -62 dBm keeps appearing: the note in 36.3.21.6.3 spells it out — it is exactly 20 dB above the -82 dBm minimum-rate sensitivity floor (-82 + 20 = -62). The energy-detect threshold is deliberately anchored to the decode floor so the two limits stay consistent across the band.
blocks.zh: 为什么 -62 dBm 反复出现：36.3.21.6.3 的注释讲得很清楚——它恰好是 -82 dBm 最低速率灵敏度底线之上 20 dB（-82 + 20 = -62）。能量检测门限被有意锚定在解码底线之上，从而让这两个限值在整个频段上保持一致。

summary.en: Predicting airtime: the RXTIME and TXTIME equations
summary.zh: 预测空口占用：RXTIME 与 TXTIME 公式

blocks.en: During receive, the PHY must know how long to hold the medium busy even when it cannot fully decode the frame. If only L-SIG is trustworthy, it falls back to Equation (36-108): RXTIME = ((LENGTH+3)/3 rounded, x4) + 20 + SignalExtension, derived purely from the L-SIG LENGTH field. Once the full EHT preamble is parsed it uses the more precise Equation (36-109): RXTIME = 20 + TEHT_PREAMBLE + NSYM x TSYM + TPE + SignalExtension. The transmit side mirrors this in 36.4.3: PLME-TXTIME.confirm returns TXTIME via Equation (36-110), TXTIME = 20 + TEHT-PREAMBLE + NSYM x TSYM + TPE + SignalExtension, where NSYM (total data OFDM symbols) comes from 36.3.13.3.5 for an EHT MU PPDU, 36.3.13.3.6 for an EHT TB PPDU, and is 0 for an EHT sounding NDP. The companion PSDU_LENGTH per user is computed from Equations (36-111) through (36-114). The leading constant 20 us is the legacy preamble time the EHT PPDU still carries for backward compatibility.
blocks.zh: 在接收过程中，即使无法完整解码帧，PHY 也必须知道要把信道置忙多久。如果只有 L-SIG 可信，它就退回到公式 (36-108)：RXTIME = ((LENGTH+3)/3 取整后 x4) + 20 + SignalExtension，完全由 L-SIG 的 LENGTH 字段推导。一旦完整解析出 EHT 前导，则改用更精确的公式 (36-109)：RXTIME = 20 + TEHT_PREAMBLE + NSYM x TSYM + TPE + SignalExtension。发送侧在 36.4.3 中与此对应：PLME-TXTIME.confirm 通过公式 (36-110) 返回 TXTIME，TXTIME = 20 + TEHT-PREAMBLE + NSYM x TSYM + TPE + SignalExtension，其中数据 OFDM 符号总数 NSYM 对 EHT MU PPDU 取自 36.3.13.3.5，对 EHT TB PPDU 取自 36.3.13.3.6，对 EHT 测探 NDP 则为 0。每用户对应的 PSDU_LENGTH 由公式 (36-111) 至 (36-114) 计算。开头那个 20 us 的常数，正是 EHT PPDU 为向后兼容仍然携带的传统前导时间。
